meta.title: Watch the biggest, baddest Atlas V launch! ULA's Atlas V 551!!!!!
meta.description:
AEHF-4 will be launched from SLC-41 at Cape Canaveral Air Force Station on an Atlas V rocket flying in the 551 configuration; 5 meter fairing, 5 AJ-60 solid rocket boosters and a single RL10C engine on the Centaur upper stage. The satellite will be deployed to a geosynchronous transfer orbit approximately 3 hours and 32 minutes after lift off. It’s target orbit is approximately 35,000 km (22,300 miles).

Want more info? Here you go! https://everydayastronaut.com/prelaunch-preview-aehf-4/

Check out my new podcast!!!! - https://ourludicrousfuture.com

Show your support and join our discord channel by becoming a Patron - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut
